user.title: De Lijn — API Configuration
user.description: Enter your Belgian Mobility open data API key.

add_stop.title: Search for a stop
add_stop.description: Search by **name** to get all platforms at that stop grouped together, or by **stop number** (printed on the stop sign) to monitor a single specific platform.

select_stop.title: Select a stop
select_stop.description: Multiple stops were found. Select the one you want to add.

confirm_stops.title: Stops configured

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key or API unreachable.
error.no_stops_found: No stops found matching your search.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the De Lijn API.
error.gtfs_download_failed: Failed to download GTFS schedule data.

force_gtfs_refresh.title: Force schedule data refresh
force_gtfs_refresh.description: This will re-download the full De Lijn schedule data (±200 MB). Continue?

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key or API unreachable.
error.no_stops_found: No stops found matching your search.
error.gtfs_download_failed: Failed to download GTFS schedule data.
